patches.summary: After-call best-effort hooks logging bash/click/screenshot/exec/key actions to the local SQLite ledger powering audit/grep/replay/idle/oversized/cost.
patches.reason: The novel commands (audit, grep, replay, idle, oversized, cost) read a local actions ledger that has no live-API equivalent. The ledger has to be populated from the leaf commands themselves; placing the hook anywhere else would make those novel commands a hollow promise.
patches.validated_outcome: Each leaf logs only after a successful API call; logging errors are silently swallowed via _ = logActionBestEffort(...). Screenshot guards on prov.Source == "live" so cache reads are not double-counted.
